page_content:
## Analysis of the Screenshot

### 1) Type of Application
This is an **AI agent/chatbot platform** called what appears to be **Agentok** or similar AI orchestration tool — specifically an AI chat interface with multi-agent capabilities, showing a conversation with Claude 4.5 Sonnet.

---

### 2) Main UI Elements & Layout
- **Left sidebar**: Navigation menu with workspace sections
- **Center-left panel**: Conversation history list
- **Main center area**: Active chat/response display
- **Right sidebar**: Participants panel showing Users, Agents, Pipelines, Toolkits, and MCPs
- **Bottom bar**: Message input field with action buttons
- **Three-column layout** overall

---

### 3) Visible Text & Labels

**Left Navigation:**
- Bugs & Features
- Create, Chat, Agents, Pipelines, Credentials, Toolkits, Applications, MCPs, Artifacts, Moderation Space
- Agents Studio, Settings, Tips, Notifications
- Aliaksei Breilian

**Conversation List:**
- Received multiple non-consecutiv...
- Call AgentConsumer and get list
- Failed to fetch file 404
- Describe this image
- Describe this
- Hello, Read image.png, ThinkingSteps

**Main Content (AI Response):**
- **Cooperation** – Learn how multiple agents can work together
- **Guardrails** – Implement safety boundaries
- **Memory** – Short-term, long-term, entity memory
- **Key Design Patterns to Study:**
  - Reflection pattern
  - Tool use pattern
  - ReAct (Reason and Act) pattern
  - Planning pattern
  - Multi-Agent pattern
- **Progressive Learning Path (5 Levels)**
- **Practical Approach**
- **Confidence Score: 95/100**
- **Source Citations:** AI Agents (2025).pdf, pages 2, 7, 10, 23, and 30

**Right Panel:**
- Participants, Users, Agents, Pipelines, Toolkits (ytesting, aipdf), MCPs
- Context Budget: 0/64000 tokens, 0%
- Strategy: Default, Messages: 0, Summaries: 0
- Clear chat history
- **Anthropic Claude 4.5 Sonnet** (model selector)

---

### 4) Key Features & Functionality
- Multi-agent conversation management
- Document/PDF analysis with source citations
- Confidence scoring system
- Toolkit integration (file attachments like PDFs)
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) support
- Pipeline management
- Context budget tracking
- Multiple AI model support
- Conversation history organization (Today/This Week/Older)

---

### 5) Color Scheme & Design Style
- **Dark theme** with deep navy/dark gray backgrounds
- **Accent colors**: Green highlights for active items, subtle blue tones
- **Typography**: Clean sans-serif, white/light gray text
- **Design style**: Modern, minimal SaaS dashboard aesthetic
- **Icons**: Outlined style, monochromatic
- Collapsible sidebar sections with chevron indicators
